title: Basic Hacks
description: Adds Basic Hacks To Your Minecraft World/Server
body:
⚠️ DISCLAIMER: 
---
**I do not endorse or support malicious hacking, cheating on public servers, or ruining the game for others. This "Basic Hacks" datapack was created for having fun in single-player or private servers with friends. To prevent abuse, all features require OP permissions to use.**

---

**This Datapack aims to recreate many popular hacks/cheats you would only normally be able use with a hacked client, such as: reach** _(hit players from furthur away)_, **aimbot** _(automaticly aims at nearby players)_, **flyhack** _(sneak to start flying in the direction you're facing)_, **wallhack** _(see where players are located similarly to how the locator bar does)_, and **b-hopping** _(jumping makes you move even faster)_!

---
**Commands:**

.

**Enable Reach** ```/function hacks:enable/reach```

**Enable Aimbot** ```/function hacks:enable/aimbot```

**Enable Flyhack** ```/function hacks:enable/flyhacks```

**Enable Wallhack** ```/function hacks:enable/wallhacks```

**Enable B-Hopping** ```/function hacks:enable/bhopping```

**Enable Criticals** ```/function hacks:enable/criticals```

**Enable Killaura** ```/function hacks:enable/killaura```

**Enable Shieldbroker** ```/function hacks:enable/shieldbroker```

**Enable Everything** ```/function hacks:enable/all```

.

**Disable Reach** ```/function hacks:disable/reach```

**Disable Aimbot** ```/function hacks:disable/aimbot```

**Disable Flyhack** ```/function hacks:disable/flyhacks```

**Disable Wallhack** ```/function hacks:disable/wallhacks```

**Disable B-Hopping** ```/function hacks:disable/bhopping```

**Enable Criticals** ```/function hacks:disable/criticals```

**Enable Killaura** ```/function hacks:disable/killaura```

**Enable Shieldbroker** ```/function hacks:disable/shieldbroker```

**Disable Everything** ```/function hacks:disable/all```
